title: "CostaRica_Aya_Analysis_Kessler"
author: "Lyanna Kessler"
date: "2023-06-01"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
chunk_output_type: console
---

# Packages

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
some_packages <- c("devtools",
                   "dplyr",
                   "plyr",
                   "tidyverse",
                   "data.table",
                   "ggplot2",
                   "ggsignif",
                   "phyloseq",
                   "patchwork",
                   "microshades",
                   "cowplot",
                   "magrittr",
                   "qiime2R",
                   "vegan",
                   "kableExtra",
                   "svglite",
                   "BiocManager",
                   "lmerTest",
                   "ANCOMBC",
                   "GMDecomp",
                   "ape",
                   "usedist",
                   "lme4",
                   "ellipse", 
                   "ggrepel",
                   "EnhancedVolcano",
                   "biomformat",
                   "ggdist",
                   "drat",
                   "ggallin",
                   "scales",
                   "ggpubr",
                   "table1",
                   "consort",
                   "MASS",
                   "nlme",
                   "pwr",
                   "data.table",
                   "glmnet",
                   "ggtree",
                   "philr",
                   "ggpmisc",
                   "mice",
                   "mitml",
                   "Biostrings",
                   "Maaslin2")

lapply(some_packages, library, character.only=TRUE)

options(kableExtra.auto_format = FALSE)
```


## Github installs
This code requires R version 4.3.1 (Beagle Scouts). Using Github, I had to download qiime2R, microshades, speedyseq, and microbiomeMaker using this code. Also had to add font for Qiime2R. And whatever else is in here, probably.

```{r}
# install.packages("remotes")
# remotes::install_github("jbisanz/qiime2R")
# remotes::install_github("KarstensLab/microshades")
# remotes::install_github("mikemc/speedyseq")
# remotes::install_github("yiluheihei/microbiomeMarker")

# remotes::install_github("pmartinezarbizu/pairwiseAdonis/pairwiseAdonis")

# Not working:
# remotes::install_github("vegandevs/vegan")

# For QIIME2R taxa barplot
# font_import()   # this code takes forever to run don't do it unless you need to
# loadfonts(device = "win")

#remotes::install_github("taryue/GMDecomp")

#remotes::install_github("kassambara/factoextra")

#remotes::install_github('fawda123/ggord')


#BiocManager::install("phyloseq")
#BiocManager::install("ANCOMBC")

# Check packages:

# ip = as.data.frame(installed.packages()[,c(1,3:4)])
# ip = ip[is.na(ip$Priority),1:2,drop=FALSE]
# ip
# 
# if (require(drat)) {
#     drat:::add("shabbychef")
#     install.packages("ggallin")
# }

# if (require(devtools)) {
#   install_github('shabbychef/ggallin')
# }


# BiocManager::install("Maaslin2")

```

## Functions: give_nickname()
```{r}

give_nickname <- function(names,
                          one_name = TRUE,
                          phylum = FALSE,
                          family = FALSE,
                          genus = FALSE) {
  # "names" must be a chr list of long names from the SILVA database
  # This function takes long taxa names from SILVA and creates a nickname for them
  # Example long name:
  # d__Bacteria; p__Bacteroidota; c__Bacteroidia; o__Bacteroidales; f__Bacteroidaceae; g__Bacteroides; s__Bacteroides_vulgatus
  # Example (one_name) nickname:
  # Bacteroides_vulgates
  # Example two-name nickname:
  # Bacteroides, Bacteroides_vulgatis
  
  taxa_clean <- names
  long <- length(names)
  
  for (i in 1:long){
    s <- str_extract(names[i], "(?<=s__)[^;]+")
    s <- ifelse(!is.na(s) &
                !str_detect(s, "uncultured|unidentified|metagenome|human_gut"),
                str_trim(s),
                NA)
        
    g <- str_extract(names[i], "(?<=g__)[^;]+")
    g <- ifelse(!is.na(g) &
                !str_detect(g, "uncultured|unidentified|metagenome|human_gut"),
                str_trim(g),
                NA)
    
    f <- str_extract(names[i], "(?<=f__)[^;]+")
    f <- ifelse(!is.na(f) &
                !str_detect(f, "uncultured|unidentified|metagenome|human_gut"),
                str_trim(f),
                NA)
  
    o <- str_extract(names[i], "(?<=o__)[^;]+")
    o <- ifelse(!is.na(o) &
                !str_detect(o, "uncultured|unidentified|metagenome|human_gut"),
                str_trim(o),
                NA)
  
    c <- str_extract(names[i], "(?<=c__)[^;]+")
    c <- ifelse(!is.na(c) &
                !str_detect(c, "uncultured|unidentified|metagenome|human_gut"),
                str_trim(c),
                NA)
    
    p <- str_extract(names[i], "(?<=p__)[^;]+")
    p <- ifelse(!is.na(p) &
                !str_detect(p, "uncultured|unidentified|metagenome|human_gut"),
                str_trim(p),
                NA)
    
    ifelse(is.na(s) == FALSE,
           name1 <- s,
      ifelse(is.na(g) == FALSE,
           name1 <- paste(g, "_genus", sep = ""),
           ifelse(is.na(f) == FALSE,
                  name1 <- paste(f, "_family", sep = ""),
                  ifelse(is.na(o) == FALSE,
                         name1 <- paste(o, "_order", sep = ""),
                         ifelse(is.na(c) == FALSE,
                                name1 <- paste(c, "_class", sep = ""),
                                ifelse(is.na(p) == FALSE,
                                       name1 <- paste(p, "_phylum", sep = ""),
                                       name1 <- "Unknown"))))))

    
        
    ifelse(is.na(g) == FALSE & name1 != paste(g, "_genus", sep = ""),
           name2 <- g,
      ifelse(is.na(f) == FALSE & name1 != paste(f, "_family", sep = ""),
           name2 <- paste(f, "_family", sep = ""),
           ifelse(is.na(o) == FALSE & name1 != paste(o, "_order", sep = ""),
                  name2 <- paste(o, "_order", sep = ""),
                  ifelse(is.na(c) == FALSE & name1 != paste(c, "_class", sep = ""),
                         name2 <- paste(c, "_class", sep = ""),
                         ifelse(is.na(p)==FALSE & name1 != paste(p, "_phylum", sep = ""),
                                name2 <- paste(p, "_phylum", sep = ""),
                                name2 <- NA)))))
    
    ifelse(one_name == TRUE,
           taxa_clean[i] <- name1,
           taxa_clean[i] <- ifelse(is.na(name2)==FALSE,
                                   paste(name2, name1, sep = ", "),
                                   name1))
    if(phylum == TRUE){
           taxa_clean[i] <- p
    }
    if(family == TRUE){
           taxa_clean[i] <- f
    }
    if(genus == TRUE){
           taxa_clean[i] <- g
    }
  }
  return(taxa_clean)
  
}



```

## Colors (Hex Codes)

mediumpurple1 = #AB82FF
palegreen = #98FB98

# Table1 and exclusion criteria
## Demographics table
Table1 package instructions from here: https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/table1/vignettes/table1-examples.html
```{r}
meta <- read_q2metadata("data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv")

# microbiome analysis participants
#meta <- filter(meta, Consumed_Aya == "yes", Timepoint == "1")

# all participants
meta <- meta[!duplicated(meta$Subject_Num), ]

# psych analysis participants
#meta <- filter(meta, Consumed_Aya == "yes", Timepoint == "1", Subject_Num != "17")

meta$Income_char <- ifelse(meta$Income == "1",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$0-5K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "2",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$5-10K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "3",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$10-20K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "4",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$20-30K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "5",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$30-40K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "6",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$40-50K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "7",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$50-60K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "8",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$60-70K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "9",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$70-80K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "10",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$80-90K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "11",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$90-100K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "12",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$100-110K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "13",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$110-120K",
                    ifelse(meta$Income == "14",
                           meta$Income_char <- "$120K or more",
                           meta$Income_char <- NA
                           ))))))))))))))

meta$Income_char <- as.factor(meta$Income_char)
meta$Income_char <- fct_relevel(meta$Income_char,
                                "$0-5K", "$5-10K", "$10-20K",
                                "$20-30K", "$30-40K", "$40-50K",
                                "$50-60K", "$60-70K", "$70-80K",
                                "$80-90K", "$90-100K", "$100-110K",
                                "$110-120K", "$120K or more")


meta$Edu_char <- ifelse(meta$Edulevel == "1",
                        meta$Edu_char <- "Less than 7 years of school",
                 ifelse(meta$Edulevel == "2",
                        meta$Edu_char <- "Some high school",
                 ifelse(meta$Edulevel == "3",
                        meta$Edu_char <- "High school (or GED)",
                 ifelse(meta$Edulevel == "4",
                        meta$Edu_char <- "Some college",
                 ifelse(meta$Edulevel == "5",
                        meta$Edu_char <- "Bachelor's",
                 ifelse(meta$Edulevel == "6",
                        meta$Edu_char <- "Masters's",
                 ifelse(meta$Edulevel == "7",
                        meta$Edu_char <- "PhD",
                        meta$Edu_char <- NA
                 )))))))

meta$Edu_char <- as.factor(meta$Edu_char)
meta$Edu_char <- fct_relevel(meta$Edu_char,
                             "Less than 7 years of school",
                             "Some high school",
                             "High school (or GED)",
                             "Some college",
                             "Bachelor's",
                             "Masters's",
                             "PhD")

label(meta$Income_char) <- "Income"
label(meta$Edu_char) <- "Education level"

units(meta$Age) <- "years"
units(meta$Income_char) <- "USD"

my.render.cont <- function(x) {
    with(stats.apply.rounding(stats.default(x), digits=2), c("",
        "Mean (SD)"=sprintf("%s (&plusmn; %s)", MEAN, SD)))
}
my.render.cat <- function(x) {
    c("", sapply(stats.default(x), function(y) with(y,
        sprintf("%d (%0.0f%%)", FREQ, PCT))))
}

table1(~ Sex + Age + Ethnicity + Income_char + Edu_char, data=meta,
       render.continuous=my.render.cont, render.categorical=my.render.cat)
```


## Exclusion flowchart
```{r}
meta <- read_q2metadata("data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv")

meta2 <- filter(meta, Timepoint == "1")
row <- filter(meta, SampleID == "27-T2") 
meta2 <- rbind(meta2, row)

meta2$exc1 <- ifelse(meta2$Subject_Num %in% c("31", "32","27") == TRUE,
                     meta$exc1 <- "Missing a sample",
                     meta$exc1 <- NA)

meta2$exc2 <- ifelse(meta2$Consumed_Aya == "no",
                     meta$exc2 <- "Did not consume ayahuasca",
                     meta$exc2 <- NA)
  
out <- consort_plot(data = meta2,
             orders = c(SampleID = "Total participants",
                          exc1    = "Excluded",
                          SampleID = "Both before/after samples",
                          exc2    = "Excluded",
                          SampleID = "Final Analysis"),
             side_box = c("exc1", "exc2"),
             cex = 0.9)
plot(out)

```


# Before-after-none analysis

## PCoA
A PCoA with the participants who did not consume ayahuasca.
```{r}
metadata <- read_q2metadata("data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv")
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$SampleID
metadata$TimeAya <- ifelse(metadata$Consumed_Aya == "yes",
                           metadata$TimeAya <- metadata$Timepoint,
                           metadata$TimeAya <- "No ayahuasca")
metadata$TimeAya <- as.factor(metadata$TimeAya)
metadata$TimeAya <- fct_recode(metadata$TimeAya,
                               "Before ayahuasca" = "1",
                               "After ayahuasca" = "2")


# subjects 31 and 32 were residents for 1 month at the healing center
metadata$Resident <- ifelse(metadata$Subject_Num %in% c("31", "32"),
                            metadata$Resident <- "1 month",
                            metadata$Resident <- "1 week")
metadata$Resident <- as.factor(metadata$Resident)
metadata$Resident <- fct_relevel(metadata$Resident,
                                 "1 week", "1 month")

# make nicknamed rarefied table
rarefied_table <-read_qza("cd-results-noaya/rarefied_table.qza")$data
taxonomy <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data
taxonomy_split <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data %>% parse_taxonomy()
taxonomy_split$Feature.ID <- taxonomy$Feature.ID
asvs <- rownames(rarefied_table)
taxa <- vector(length=length(asvs))
phylum <- vector(length=length(asvs))

i <- 1
for (a in asvs){
    taxa[i] <- taxonomy[taxonomy$Feature.ID==a,"Taxon"]
    phylum[i] <- taxonomy_split[taxonomy_split$Feature.ID==a,"Phylum"]
    i <- i + 1
}

df <- data.frame(asvs, taxa, phylum)
rarefied_table_tax <- rarefied_table
rownames(rarefied_table_tax) <- df$phylum

# PCoA plot with weighted UniFrac
pcoa_w_uni <- read_qza("cd-results-noaya/weighted_unifrac_pcoa_results.qza")$data
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata <- pcoa_w_uni$Vectors
rownames(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata) <- pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$SampleID
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata <- merge(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata, metadata)
# pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- ifelse(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Timepoint=="1",
#                                     yes="Before", no="After")
# pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- factor(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group)
# pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- fct_relevel(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group, "Before", "After")

# making biplot arrows
r_otus <- rarefied_table_tax
r_otus <- t(r_otus)
r_otus <- sweep(r_otus, 1, rowSums(r_otus), '/')

w_unipcoa <- dplyr::select(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata, PC1, PC2)
w_unipcoa <- data.matrix(w_unipcoa)
rownames(w_unipcoa) <- pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$SampleID

# prep data for pulling columns
df_rotus <- as.data.frame(rarefied_table)
df_rotus <- t(df_rotus)
# normalize and create weighted average
rotus.norm <- sweep(r_otus,2,colSums(r_otus),'/')
r.wa <- t(rotus.norm) %*% w_unipcoa # weighted average


ggplot(data=pcoa_w_uni_plotdata,
       mapping=aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=TimeAya, label=Subject_Num, shape = Resident)) +
    geom_text(color="black") + 
    geom_point(alpha=0.6, size=8) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("Before ayahuasca" = "mediumpurple1", 
                                "After ayahuasca" = "palegreen", 
                                "No ayahuasca" = "salmon")) +
    geom_line(aes(group = Subject_Num),color="grey") +
    theme_bw() + 
    stat_ellipse(aes(group = TimeAya),
                 level =.95) +
    #scale_color_discrete(name="") +
    xlab(paste0("PC1 (", round(pcoa_w_uni$ProportionExplained[1]*100, 1), "%)")) +
    ylab(paste0("PC2 (", round(pcoa_w_uni$ProportionExplained[2]*100, 1), "%)")) +
    theme(text = element_text(size=16),
          legend.text=element_text(size=16),
          legend.position = c(0.14, 0.8),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_blank(),
          panel.background = element_blank()) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Group", order = 1),
         shape = guide_legend(title = "Visit length", order = 2))



#ggsave(file="figures/before-after-none_pcoa.svg", width=10, height=8)
#ggsave(file="figures/before-after-none_pcoa.png", width=10, height=8)

```

## Taxa bar plot 
Code developed by John Sterrett.

### Load data
```{r}
pseq <- qiime2R::qza_to_phyloseq(feature="data/filtered-table.qza",
                                 taxonomy="data/taxonomy-silva.qza",
                                 metadata="data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv")

# meta <- sample_data(pseq)
# meta$Consumed_Aya <- fct_recode(meta$Consumed_Aya,
#                                 "Consumed ayahuasca" = "yes",
#                                 "No ayahuasca" = "no") 
# sample_data(pseq) <- meta

taxonomy.table <- pseq %>% tax_table() %>% as.data.frame()
taxonomy.table$Phylum[taxonomy.table$Phylum=="Firmicutes"] <- "Bacillota"


tax_table(pseq) <- as.matrix(taxonomy.table)
```

### Microshades Function {.tabset}
```{r}
subgroup <- "Family"

my_plot_microshades <- function (mdf_group,
                                cdf,
                                group_label = "Phylum Genus",
                                x = "Sample",
                                y = "Abundance")
{
  if (class(mdf_group) != "data.frame")
  {
    stop("mdf_group argument must be a data frame")
  }

  if(any(is.na(cdf$hex) | is.na(cdf$group)))
  {
    stop("cdf does not contain complete color information - missing hex or group info")
  }


  plot <- mdf_group %>%
    ggplot(aes_string(x = x, y = y), fill = group_label) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = group_label,
                      values = cdf$hex,
                      breaks = cdf$group) +
    scale_colour_manual(name = group_label,
                        values = cdf$hex,
                        breaks = cdf$group) +
    geom_bar(aes(color=group, fill=group), stat="identity", position="stack") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  plot
}

make_microshades_phylum <- function(pseq, subgroup){
    # prep the microshades colors
    mdf_prep <- prep_mdf(pseq, subgroup_level=subgroup)
    # sort the phylum names
    phylum_table <- tax_glom(pseq, taxrank="Phylum", ) %>% otu_table()
    phyla.otunames <- rownames(phylum_table)
    
    phylums <- taxonomy.table[phyla.otunames,"Phylum"]
    
    sorted_phylums <- phylums[order(rowSums(phylum_table), decreasing=T)]
    # create the colors object
    color_objs_GP <- create_color_dfs(mdf_prep, selected_groups=sorted_phylums[5:1], 
                                      cvd = TRUE, subgroup_level=subgroup)
    # Extract
    mdf_GP <- color_objs_GP$mdf
    cdf_GP <- color_objs_GP$cdf
    # create a custom legend
    GP_legend <-custom_legend(mdf_GP, cdf_GP, 
                              legend_key_size=unit(0.4, "cm"),
                              legend_text_size=10, subgroup_level=subgroup)
    
    # plot
    plot <- my_plot_microshades(mdf_GP, cdf_GP)
    plot_1 <- plot + scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = expansion(0)) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")  +
      #theme(axis.text.x = element_blank()) +
      facet_grid(~Consumed_Aya+ Subject_Num, scales="free_x", space="free_x")
    
    multi <- plot_grid(plot_1, GP_legend,
                       rel_widths = c(1, .25))
    multi
}



```



### Plot
```{r, warning=F, echo=F, fig.height=8}
make_microshades_phylum(pseq, "Family")
#ggsave(file="figures/taxa_barplot_all.png", width=11, height=8, bg = "white")
#ggsave(file="figures/taxa_barplot_all.svg", width=11, height=8, bg = "white")

```

# Before-After Aya Analysis
## Bacillota:Bacteroidota ratio (Firmicutes:Bacteroides)
Increased or decreased F/B ratio is regarded as dysbiosis, whereby the former is usually observed with obesity
"Optimal Result: 12 - 620 Ratio."
A high-fiber diet can increase the abundance of Firmicutes and reduce the abundance of Bacteroides and consequently increase the concentration of short-chain fatty acids (SCFAs) in the intestine, inhibiting the development of CRC [Colorectal cancer].
```{r}
# read table and convert to percent relative abundance
rarefied_table <-read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data

ra_avg_mat <- rarefied_table

for (row in 1:nrow(rarefied_table)){
  for (col in 1:ncol(rarefied_table)){
    total <- sum(rarefied_table[,col])
    ra_avg_mat[row, col] <- rarefied_table[row, col]/total * 100
  }
}

table <- as.data.frame(ra_avg_mat)


taxonomy <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data
asvs <- rownames(table)
taxa <- vector(length=length(asvs))

i <- 1
for (a in asvs){
    taxa[i] <- taxonomy[taxonomy$Feature.ID==a,"Taxon"]
    i <- i + 1
}

taxa_clean <- give_nickname(taxa, one_name = TRUE)
taxa_phylum <- give_nickname(taxa, one_name = TRUE, phylum = TRUE)


table_phy <- table
sums <- rowSums(table_phy)
table_phy <- as.data.frame(table_phy)
table_phy$phylum <- taxa_phylum
table_phy$sums <- sums

only_phy <- dplyr::select(table_phy, c("phylum", "sums"))
only_phy$phylum <- as.factor(only_phy$phylum) 
phy_sums<- rowsum(only_phy$sums, only_phy$phylum)
phy_sums <- as.data.frame(phy_sums)
colnames(phy_sums)[1] <- 'total_abun'
phy_sums$percent <- phy_sums$total_abun / sum(phy_sums$total_abun) * 100
phy_sums$total_abun <- format(phy_sums$total_abun, scientific = FALSE)
phy_sums$percent <- format(phy_sums$percent, scientific = FALSE)

tp_firm <- filter(table_phy, phylum == "Firmicutes")
tp_bac <- filter(table_phy, phylum == "Bacteroidota")

tp_firm <- sapply(tp_firm, as.numeric)
tp_firm <- t(tp_firm)
f_sums <- rowSums(tp_firm)
tp_firm <- as.data.frame(tp_firm)
tp_firm$firm_sums <- f_sums
df_firm <- dplyr::select(tp_firm, firm_sums)
df_firm$ID <- row.names(df_firm)

tp_bac <- sapply(tp_bac, as.numeric)
tp_bac <- t(tp_bac)
b_sums <- rowSums(tp_bac)
tp_bac <- as.data.frame(tp_bac)
tp_bac$bac_sums <- b_sums
df_bac <- dplyr::select(tp_bac, bac_sums)


df_ratio <- cbind(df_firm, df_bac)
df_ratio$firm_bac_ratio <- df_ratio$firm_sums / df_ratio$bac_sums
df_ratio <- filter(df_ratio, ID != "phylum" & ID != "sums")

df_ratio$Timepoint <- rep(c("Before", "After"), 13)
df_ratio$Timepoint <- as.factor(df_ratio$Timepoint)
df_ratio$Timepoint <- fct_relevel(df_ratio$Timepoint, 
                                  c("Before", "After"))

plot(df_ratio$Timepoint, df_ratio$firm_bac_ratio)
# write.csv(df_ratio, "hf_ratios.csv", row.names=FALSE)

fb_t <- t.test(data = df_ratio, firm_bac_ratio ~ Timepoint, paired = TRUE)
fb_p <- fb_t$p.value %>% signif(3)
fb_est <- fb_t$estimate[[1]] %>% signif(3)

df_ratio$Subject <- substr(df_ratio$ID, 1, 2)


firm <- ggplot(data = df_ratio, aes(x = Timepoint, y = firm_sums, fill = Timepoint)) +
  #geom_boxplot() +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size=16),
    legend.position="none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  labs(title = "Bacillota abundance",
       x = "Timepoint",
       y = "Percent relative abundance") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 80))


bac <- ggplot(data = df_ratio, aes(x = Timepoint, y = bac_sums, fill = Timepoint)) +
  #geom_boxplot() +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size=16),
    legend.position="none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  labs(title = "Bacteroidota abundance",
       x = "Timepoint",
        y = "Percent relative abundance") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 80))


fb <- ggplot(data = df_ratio, aes(x = Timepoint, y = firm_bac_ratio, fill = Timepoint)) +
  #geom_boxplot() +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size=16),
    legend.position="none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  labs(title = "Bacillota/Bacteroidota Ratio",
       x = "Timepoint",
       y = "log(Bacillota/Bacteroidota Ratio)") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log10')


fig <- ggarrange(firm, bac, fb,
                 labels = c("A", "B", "C"),
                 font.label=list(color="black", size=20),
                 nrow = 1, ncol = 3)

annotate_figure(fig,
                bottom = text_grob("Timepoint", size = 18))


#ggsave("figures/fb_ratio_panels_violins.svg", width = 12, height = 6, units = "in")
```



## Alpha Diversity
```{r}
# alpha paired T-tests
shan <- read_q2metadata("data/shannon_sig_cr.tsv") # got this file from QIIME qzv
shan_t <- t.test(data = shan, shannon_entropy ~ Timepoint, paired = TRUE)
shan_p <- shan_t$p.value %>% signif(3)
shan_est <- shan_t$estimate[[1]] %>% signif(3)

faith <- read_q2metadata("data/faith_sig_cr.tsv") # got this file from QIIME qzv
faith_t <- t.test(data = faith, faith_pd ~ Timepoint, paired = TRUE)
faith_p <- faith_t$p.value %>% signif(3)
faith_est <- faith_t$estimate[[1]] %>% signif(3)

even <- read_q2metadata("data/even_sig_cr.tsv") # got this file from QIIME qzv
even_t <- t.test(data = even, pielou_evenness ~ Timepoint, paired = TRUE)
even_p <- even_t$p.value %>% signif(3)
even_est <- even_t$estimate[[1]] %>% signif(3)

alpha_table <- shan
names(alpha_table)[names(alpha_table) == "shannon_entropy"] <- "Shannon"
alpha_table$Faith <- faith$faith_pd
alpha_table$Evenness <- even$pielou_evenness

alpha_table$Timepoint <- as.factor(alpha_table$Timepoint)
alpha_table$Timepoint <- fct_recode(alpha_table$Timepoint,
                                    "Before" = "1",
                                    "After" = "2")


## Richness
SVs <- read_qza("data/cr-table.qza")$data
SVs <- t(SVs)
list <- rowSums(SVs)
list <- t(t(list))
df_svs <- as.data.frame(SVs)
df_svs$counts <- list

df_svs <- dplyr::select(df_svs, counts)

rare <- read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data
rare <- t(rare)
list <- rowSums(rare)
list <- t(t(list))
r_df <- as.data.frame(rare)
r_counts <- r_df
r_counts$counts <- list

r_counts <- dplyr::select(r_counts, counts)
#write.csv(r_df, "rarefied_richness.csv", row.names=TRUE)

# number of species per sample
r_bi <- apply(r_df, 2, function(x) ifelse(x != 0, 1, x))
list <- rowSums(r_bi)
list <- t(t(list))
r_counts <- r_bi
r_counts <- as.data.frame(r_counts)
r_counts$counts <- list

#hist(r_counts)

r_counts <- dplyr::select(r_counts, counts)
r_counts$Timepoint <- rep(c(1,2), 13)
asvs_test <- t.test(data = r_counts, counts ~ Timepoint, paired = TRUE)
asvs_p <- asvs_test$p.value %>% signif(3)

alpha_table$ASVs <- r_counts$counts

# alpha_table <- pivot_longer(alpha_table, cols = c("Shannon", "Faith", "Evenness"),
#                             names_to = "Metric",
#                             values_to = "Alpha_score")

# alpha_table$Metric <- fct_recode(alpha_table$Metric,
#                                  "Pielou's Evenness" = "Evenness",
#                                  "Faith's Phylogenetic Diversity" = "Faith",
#                                  "Shannon Entropy" = "Shannon")


pe <- ggplot(data = alpha_table, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Evenness, fill = Timepoint)) +
  #geom_boxplot() +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject_Num), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  labs(title = "Pielou's evenness") +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0),
    axis.line = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size=16),
    legend.title=element_text(size=16),
    legend.text=element_text(size=16),
    legend.key=element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1))

fd <- ggplot(data = alpha_table, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Faith, fill = Timepoint)) +
  #geom_boxplot() +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject_Num), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  labs(title = "Faith's diversity") +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0),
    axis.line = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size=16),
    legend.title=element_text(size=16),
    legend.text=element_text(size=16),
    legend.key=element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 80))

se <- ggplot(data = alpha_table, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Shannon, fill = Timepoint)) +
  #geom_boxplot() +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject_Num), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  labs(title = "Shannon entropy") +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0),
    axis.line = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size=16),
    legend.title=element_text(size=16),
    legend.text=element_text(size=16),
    legend.key=element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8))

oa <- ggplot(data = alpha_table, aes(x = Timepoint, y = ASVs, fill = Timepoint)) +
  #geom_boxplot() +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject_Num), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  labs(title = "Observed ASVs") +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0),
    axis.line = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour="black", size = 1),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size=16),
    legend.title=element_text(size=16),
    legend.text=element_text(size=16),
    legend.key=element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 300))


fig <- ggarrange(pe, fd, se, oa,
                 labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D"),
                 font.label=list(color="black",size=20),
                 nrow = 1, ncol = 4)

annotate_figure(fig,
                left = text_grob("Score",
                                 rot = 90, size = 16, face = "bold"),
                bottom = text_grob("Timepoint", size = 16, face = "bold"))

#ggsave("figures/alpha_violins.png", width = 12, height = 6, units = "in")
#ggsave("figures/alpha_violins.svg", width = 12, height = 6, units = "in")
```

## Beta Diversity

## Vegan Adonis PERMANOVA
```{r}
metadata <- read_q2metadata("data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv")
metadata <- filter(metadata, Consumed_Aya == "yes")
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$SampleID

w_uni <- read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/weighted_unifrac_distance_matrix.qza")$data
u_uni <- read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/unweighted_unifrac_distance_matrix.qza")$data

## Dispersion analysis
mod <- betadisper(w_uni, metadata$Timepoint)
anova(mod)
permutest(mod, pairwise=T, permutations = 99)
plot(mod)

## Adonis 
vegan::adonis2(u_uni ~ Timepoint,
               data=metadata,
               strata= metadata$Subject_Num)

vegan::adonis2(w_uni ~ Timepoint,
               data=metadata,
               strata= metadata$Subject_Num)

vegan::adonis2(w_uni ~ Timepoint, 
               data = metadata,
               strata = metadata$Subject_Num,
               permutations = 2000) # default = 999, try making it larger

```

### ANCOM BC
Ancom with Bias Correction (BC)
#### ANCOM ASV level
```{r}
# Prep data
unweight <- read_csv("data/unweigh_tp_permanova-pairwise.csv") # from QIIME qzv
unweight_p <- unweight$`p-value` %>% signif(3)


weight <- read_csv("data/weigh_tp_permanova-pairwise.csv") # from QIIME qzv
weight_p <- weight$`p-value` %>% signif(3)


metadata <- read_q2metadata("data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv")
metadata <- filter(metadata, Consumed_Aya == "yes")
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$SampleID

SVs <- read_qza("data/cr-table.qza")$data


rarefied_table <-read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data
taxonomy <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data

asvs <- rownames(rarefied_table)
taxa <- vector(length=length(asvs))

i <- 1
for (a in asvs){
    taxa[i] <- taxonomy[taxonomy$Feature.ID==a,"Taxon"]
    i <- i + 1
}

taxa_clean <- give_nickname(taxa, one_name = T)
rarefied_table_tax <- rarefied_table
rownames(rarefied_table_tax) <- taxa_clean

p.dat <- phyloseq(otu_table(rarefied_table, taxa_are_rows=T), 
                  taxa_names(taxonomy),
                  sample_data(metadata))


# Run ANCOM BC
if (file.exists("ancom/ancom_asv.rds")) {
  ancom.time.ost.me <- readRDS("ancom/ancom_asv.rds")
} else {
  ancom.time.ost.me <- ancombc2(data=p.dat, 
                                fix_formula="Timepoint", 
                                rand_formula="(1|Subject_Num)",
                                tax_level="Species",
                                p_adj_method="fdr")
  saveRDS(ancom.time.ost.me, "ancom/ancom_asv.rds")
}

# get results
res_asv <- ancom.time.ost.me$res
# create a named list to access the actual taxonomy
tax.map <- taxonomy$Taxon
names(tax.map) <- taxonomy$Feature.ID

# add the taxonomy name
res_asv$name <- tax.map[res_asv$taxon]

res_nicknames <- give_nickname(names = res_asv$name, one_name = TRUE)
res_asv$nickname <- res_nicknames


# make table
res_asv[order(res_asv$`q_Timepoint2`),] %>% 
    dplyr::select(name,
           nickname,
           taxon,
           lfc_Timepoint2,
           p_Timepoint2,
           q_Timepoint2,
           ) %>%
    DT::datatable()

res_asv_top <- filter(res_asv, lfc_Timepoint2 > 1 | lfc_Timepoint2 < -1,
                  q_Timepoint2 < .05)


#write.csv(x = res_top, file = "data/res_top.csv", row.names = F)


## PCL5?
metadata$PCL5_dich <- ifelse(metadata$PCL5_sum_1_2 > 31,
                             metadata$PCL5_dich <- "Yes",
                             metadata$PCL5_dich <- "No")

metadata$PCL5_dich <- as.factor(metadata$PCL5_dich)

meta_no17 <- filter(metadata, metadata$Subject_Num != "17")
meta_no17$Subject_Num <- as.character(meta_no17$Subject_Num)
meta_no17$Subject_Num <- as.factor(meta_no17$Subject_Num)

rare_no17 <- as.data.frame(rarefied_table)
rare_no17 <- dplyr::select(rare_no17, -`17-T1`, -`17-T2`)
rare_no17 <- as.matrix(rare_no17)

# ancom says too many low variance columns, fixing here
t_rare <- t(rare_no17)
rare_df <- as.data.frame(t_rare)

# drop 0's
# drop low variance columns
i <- 0
for (col in 1:ncol(rare_df)){
  ifelse(sum(rare_df[,col]) == 0,
         rare_df[1:nrow(rare_df),col] <- NA,
                 ifelse(var(rare_df[,col]) < .5,
                            rare_df[1:nrow(rare_df),col] <- NA,
                            i <- i+1))
}
cols_dropped = ncol(rare_df) - i

rare_df_v <- rare_df[, colSums(is.na(rare_df)) == 0]
rare_df_t <- t(rare_df_v)

phylo_pcl5 <- phyloseq(otu_table(rare_df_t, taxa_are_rows=T), 
                  taxa_names(taxonomy),
                  sample_data(meta_no17))

# Run ANCOM BC
# if (file.exists("ancom/ancom_asv_ptsd.rds")) {
#   ancom_asv_ptsd <- readRDS("ancom/ancom_asv_ptsd.rds")
# } else {
#   ancom_asv_ptsd <- ancombc2(data=phylo_pcl5, 
#                                 fix_formula="PCL5_dich", 
#                                 tax_level="Species",
#                                 p_adj_method="fdr")
#   saveRDS(ancom_asv_ptsd, "ancom/ancom_asv_ptsd.rds")
# }


```


##### ANCOM ASV Facetedboxplot (with spaghetti)
Run the code above first.
```{r}
# convert rarefied table to percent abundance
rarefied_table <-read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data

ra_avg_mat <- rarefied_table

for (row in 1:nrow(rarefied_table)){
  for (col in 1:ncol(rarefied_table)){
    total <- sum(rarefied_table[,col])
    ra_avg_mat[row, col] <- rarefied_table[row, col]/total * 100
  }
}

rare_df <- as.data.frame(ra_avg_mat)
top_asvs <- rare_df[(row.names(rare_df) %in% res_asv_top$taxon),]

## TODO: fix y-axes (show 0), and add asteriks for p-values, change timepoint to before and after

asvs <- rownames(top_asvs)
taxa <- vector(length=length(asvs))

i <- 1
for (a in asvs){
    taxa[i] <- taxonomy[taxonomy$Feature.ID==a,"Taxon"]
    i <- i + 1
}

top_nicknames <- give_nickname(names = taxa, one_name = TRUE)
top_nn <- as.data.frame(top_nicknames)

pc_nn <- "italic('Pseudoflavonifractor capillosus')"
rs_nn <- "italic('Romboutsia sp. CE17')"
cf_nn <- "italic('Citrobacter freundii')"
cm_nn <- "italic('Clostridium sp. Marseille-P7770')"
fb_nn <- "italic('Flintibacter butyricus')"
or_nn <- "italic('Oscillibacter ruminantium GH1')"
bl_nn <- "italic('Blautia luti')"


top_nn <- top_nn %>% 
  mutate(top_nicknames = str_replace(top_nicknames, 
                             "Clostridium_sp", 
                             pc_nn),
         top_nicknames = str_replace(top_nicknames, 
                             "Romboutsia_genus", 
                             rs_nn),
         top_nicknames = str_replace(top_nicknames, 
                             "Enterobacteriaceae_family", 
                             cf_nn),
         top_nicknames = str_replace(top_nicknames, 
                             "Lachnospiraceae_UCG_genus", 
                             cm_nn),
         top_nicknames = str_replace(top_nicknames, 
                             "Colidextribacter_genus", 
                             fb_nn),
         top_nicknames = str_replace(top_nicknames, 
                             "Oscillospira_genus",
                             or_nn),
         top_nicknames = str_replace(top_nicknames,
                             "Blautia_genus",
                             bl_nn))

top_asv_df <- top_asvs
top_asv_df$nicknames <- top_nn$top_nicknames

top_long <- pivot_longer(top_asv_df,
                         cols = c(1:26),
                         names_to = "ID",
                         values_to = "RA")
top_long$ID <- as.factor(top_long$ID)
top_long$Timepoint <- rep(c(1,2), 91)
top_long$Timepoint <- as.factor(top_long$Timepoint)
top_long$Timepoint <- fct_recode(top_long$Timepoint,
                                 "Before" = "1",
                                 "After" = "2")

top_long$Subject <- substr(top_long$ID, start = 1, stop = 2)
top_long$Subject <- as.factor(top_long$Subject)

ggplot(top_long, aes(x=Timepoint, y=RA, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  geom_swarm(shape=16,
             position=position_jitter(0.2),
             color="black") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log10') +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = "Timepoint",
       y = "Log(Percent Relative Abundance)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  facet_wrap(~top_long$nicknames,
              scales='free',
              labeller = label_parsed)


```

##### Violins: ANCOM ASV
Run code above first.
Doing this since there is no way in ggplot to do custom y-axes for each facet, especially after log10 transformation.
Inverse hyperbolic sine trans: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/14504869/histogram-with-negative-logarithmic-scale-in-r
```{r}
# reshape
top_mat <- top_asvs
top_mat <- t(top_asvs)

asvs <- colnames(top_mat)
taxa <- vector(length=length(asvs))

i <- 1
for (a in asvs){
    taxa[i] <- taxonomy[taxonomy$Feature.ID==a,"Taxon"]
    i <- i + 1
}

taxa_clean <- give_nickname(taxa, one_name=T)
colnames(top_mat) <- taxa_clean
top_df <- as.data.frame(top_mat)

top_df$Timepoint <- rep(c(1,2), 13)
top_df$Timepoint <- as.factor(top_df$Timepoint)
top_df$Timepoint <- fct_recode(top_df$Timepoint,
                                 "Before" = "1",
                                 "After" = "2")
top_df$ID <- rownames(top_df)
top_df$Subject <- substr(top_df$ID, start = 1, stop = 2)
top_df$Subject <- as.factor(top_df$Subject)

cs_nn <- "Clostridium_sp" 
rs_nn <- "Romboutsia_genus" 
en_nn <- "Enterobacteriaceae_family"
lu_nn <- "Lachno_UCG_genus" 
cx_nn <- "Colidextribacter_genus" 
or_nn <- "Oscillospira_genus" 
bl_nn <- "Blautia_genus"


# each plot assigned to value
cs <- ggplot(top_df, aes(x=Timepoint, y= Clostridium_sp, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  # p = 2.362421e-05, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = .7, xend = "After", yend = .7)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=.72, label = "***", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 14, face="italic"),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = cs_nn) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, .75))


# PLOT B
en <- ggplot(top_df, aes(x=Timepoint, y= Enterobacteriaceae_family, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .4) +
  # p = 2.719262e-02, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = .46, xend = "After", yend = .46)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=.47, label = "*", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 14),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = en_nn) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, .5))

# PLOT C
lu <- ggplot(top_df, aes(x=Timepoint, y= Lachnospiraceae_UCG_genus, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .4) +
  # p = 3.136582e-02, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = .84, xend = "After", yend = .84)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=.86, label = "*", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 14, face="italic"),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = lu_nn) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, .9))


# PLOT D
cx <- ggplot(top_df, aes(x=Timepoint, y= Colidextribacter_genus, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .4) +
  # p = 8.646945e-03, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = .155, xend = "After", yend = .155)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=.16, label = "**", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 14, face="italic"),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = cx_nn) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, .17))

# PLOT E
or <- ggplot(top_df, aes(x=Timepoint,
                         y=Oscillospira_genus, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .4) +
  # p = 8.646945e-03, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = .076, xend = "After", yend = .076)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=.078, label = "**", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 14, face="italic"),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = or_nn) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, .082))

# PLOT F
bl <- ggplot(top_df, aes(x=Timepoint,
                         y=Blautia_genus, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=.5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .4) +
  # p = 3.136582e-02, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = .61, xend = "After", yend = .61)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=.62, label = "*", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 14, face="italic"),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = bl_nn) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, .65))


# PLOT G
rs <- ggplot(top_df, aes(x=Timepoint, y= Romboutsia_genus, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  # p = 4.392681e-06, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = 7, xend = "After", yend = 7)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=7.2, label = "***", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 14, face="italic"),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = "Timepoint",
       y = "Log(Percent Relative Abundance)",
       title = rs_nn) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 8))


# grid of each plots
fig <- ggarrange(cs, en, lu, cx, or, bl, rs, 
                 labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F", "G"),
                 nrow = 2, ncol = 4)

annotate_figure(fig,
                left = text_grob("Log(Percent Relative Abundance)", 
                                 rot = 90, size = 16),
                bottom = text_grob("Timepoint", size = 16))

#ggsave(file="figures/ANCOM_ASV_violins.svg", width=11, height=8)
```

###### BLAST Info
Panel A shows an increase in Pseudoflavonifractor capillosus (Clostridium species in SILVA). 
Panel B shows an increase in Citrobacter freundii (unspecified Enterobacteriaceae in SILVA). 
Panel C shows an increase in Clostridium sp. Marseille-P770 (unspecified Lachnospiraceae UCG genus in SILVA). 
Panel D shows an increase in Flintibacter butyricus (unspecified Colidextribacter genus in SILVA). 
Panel E shows an increase in Oscillibacter ruminantium GH1 (unspecified Oscillospira genus in SILVA). 
Panel F shows an increase in Blautia luti (unspecified Blautia genus in SILVA. 
Panel G shows an increase in Romboutsia sp. CE17 (unspecified Romboutsia genus in SILVA).


##### Volcano Plot (ASV)
Run ANCOM BC on ASV level first
```{r}

res_asv <- res_asv %>%
  mutate(nickname = str_replace(nickname,
                             "Clostridium_sp",
                             "italic('Clostridium_sp')"),
         nickname = str_replace(nickname,
                             "Romboutsia_genus",
                             "italic('Romboutsia_genus')"),
         nickname = str_replace(nickname,
                             "Lachnospiraceae_UCG_genus",
                       "italic('Lachnospiraceae_UCG_genus')"),
         nickname = str_replace(nickname,
                             "Colidextribacter_genus",
                         "italic('Colidextribacter_genus')"),
         nickname = str_replace(nickname,
                             "Oscillospira_genus",
                             "italic('Oscillospira_genus')"),
         nickname = str_replace(nickname,
                             "Blautia_genus",
                             "italic('Blautia_genus')"))

EnhancedVolcano(res_asv,
                lab = res_asv$nickname,
                x = 'lfc_Timepoint2',
                y = 'q_Timepoint2',
                ylim = c(0, 7.5),
                pCutoff = 0.05,
                FCcutoff = 1,
                parseLabels = TRUE,
                arrowheads = FALSE,
                drawConnectors = TRUE,
                widthConnectors = .75)

# q = FDR-corrected p-value
#ggsave(file="figures/volcano_ASV.png", width=8, height=6)
```




#### ANCOM Genus level
```{r}

p.dat <- qiime2R::qza_to_phyloseq(features = "core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza",
                                  metadata = "data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv",
                                  taxonomy = "data/taxonomy-silva.qza")

p.dat <- subset_taxa(p.dat, Genus != "uncultured")

# Run ANCOM BC
if (file.exists("ancom/ancom_genus.rds")) {
  ancom.time.ost.me <- readRDS("ancom/ancom_genus.rds")
} else {
  ancom.time.ost.me <- ancombc2(data=p.dat, 
                                fix_formula="Timepoint", 
                                rand_formula="(1|Subject_Num)",
                                tax_level="Genus",
                                p_adj_method="fdr")
  saveRDS(ancom.time.ost.me, "ancom/ancom_genus.rds")
}

# get results
res <- ancom.time.ost.me$res

# make table
res[order(res$`q_Timepoint2`),] %>% 
    dplyr::select(taxon,
           lfc_Timepoint2,
           p_Timepoint2,
           q_Timepoint2) %>%
    DT::datatable()

res_top <- filter(res, lfc_Timepoint2 > 1 | lfc_Timepoint2 < -1,
                  q_Timepoint2 < .05)


# Figure out who has [Eubacterium]_eligens_group
res_feat <- ancom.time.ost.me$feature_table
taxonomy <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data
taxonomy_split <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data %>% parse_taxonomy()
taxonomy_split$Feature.ID <- taxonomy$Feature.ID
rarefied_table <-read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data

SVs <- read_qza("data/cr-table.qza")$data
asvs <- rownames(rarefied_table)
taxa <- vector(length=length(asvs))
genus <- vector(length=length(asvs))
count <- 0

i <- 1
for (a in asvs){
    taxa[i] <- taxonomy[taxonomy$Feature.ID==a,"Taxon"]
    genus[i] <- taxonomy_split[taxonomy_split$Feature.ID==a,"Genus"]
    if ("[Eubacterium]_eligens_group" %in% genus[i] == TRUE){
      count <- count + 1
    }
    i <- i + 1
}

# Four ASVs have [Eubacterium]_eligens_group
df <- data.frame(asvs, taxa, genus)

tax_eubac <- filter(df, genus == "[Eubacterium]_eligens_group")

#write.csv(x = tax_eubac, file = "data/top_ANCOMgenus_ASVs.csv", row.names = F)
```


##### Violin: ANCOM Genus
```{r}
top_df <- read_csv("data/top_ANCOMgenus_ASVs.csv")
rarefied_table <- read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data
ra_avg_mat <- rarefied_table

# normalize
for (row in 1:nrow(rarefied_table)){
  for (col in 1:ncol(rarefied_table)){
    total <- sum(rarefied_table[,col])
    ra_avg_mat[row, col] <- rarefied_table[row, col]/total * 100
  }
}

rare_df <- as.data.frame(ra_avg_mat)
# just the four relevant taxa for Lachnospira
top_asvs <- rare_df[(row.names(rare_df) %in% top_df$asvs),]

# get data ready for plotting
top_mat <- t(top_asvs)
top_mat <- as.data.frame(top_mat)
top_mat$Timepoint <- rep(c(1,2), 13)
top_mat$Timepoint <- as.factor(top_mat$Timepoint)
top_mat$ID <- rownames(top_mat)
top_mat$Subject <- substr(top_mat$ID, start = 1, stop = 2)
top_mat$Subject <- as.factor(top_mat$Subject)

top_long <- pivot_longer(top_mat,
                         cols = c(1:4),
                         names_to = "asvs",
                         values_to = "Counts")
top_long$SubASV <- paste(top_long$Subject, top_long$asvs)
top_long$Timepoint <- fct_recode(top_long$Timepoint,
                                 "Before" = "1",
                                 "After" = "2")

ggplot(top_long, aes(x=Timepoint, y= Counts, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=3) +
  geom_point(alpha=.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group=SubASV), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  # p = 0.011, from ancom genus res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = 3.3, xend = "After", yend = 3.3)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=3.4, label = "*", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 14, face="italic"),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Eubacterium eligens group",
       y = "Log(Percent Relative Abundance)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 3.5))

#ggsave(file="figures/ANCOM_violins_genus.png", width=8, height=6)
#write.csv(top_mat, "data/top_genus_counts.csv")
```

##### Volcano Plot (Genus)
Run ANCOM BC on Genus level first
```{r}

res$taxon <- as.factor(res$taxon)

res$taxon <- fct_recode(res$taxon,
                         "italic('Eubacterium_eligens_group')" = "[Eubacterium]_eligens_group")

EnhancedVolcano(res,
                lab = res$taxon,
                x = 'lfc_Timepoint2',
                y = 'q_Timepoint2',
                ylim = c(0, 7.5),
                pCutoff = 0.05,
                FCcutoff = 1,
                parseLabels = TRUE,
                drawConnectors = TRUE,
                widthConnectors = .5,
                arrowheads = FALSE,
                colConnectors = 'black',
                typeConnectors = "closed")

#ggsave("figures/volcano_genus.svg", height=6, width=8, units="in")

```


#### ANCOM Family level
```{r}

p.dat <- qiime2R::qza_to_phyloseq(features = "core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza",
                                  metadata = "data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv",
                                  taxonomy = "data/taxonomy-silva.qza")

p.dat <- subset_taxa(p.dat, Family != "uncultured")

# Run ANCOM BC
if (file.exists("ancom/ancom_family.rds")) {
  ancom.family <- readRDS("ancom/ancom_family.rds")
} else {
  ancom.family <- ancombc2(data=p.dat, 
                                fix_formula="Timepoint", 
                                rand_formula="(1|Subject_Num)",
                                tax_level="Family",
                                p_adj_method="fdr")
  saveRDS(ancom.family, "ancom/ancom_family.rds")
}

# get results
res <- ancom.family$res

# no significant q-values (FDR-corrected p-values)

```


#### ANCOM Phylum level
```{r}

p.dat <- qiime2R::qza_to_phyloseq(features = "core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza",
                                  metadata = "data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv",
                                  taxonomy = "data/taxonomy-silva.qza")


# Run ANCOM BC
if (file.exists("ancom/ancom_phylum.rds")) {
  ancom <- readRDS("ancom/ancom_phylum.rds")
} else {
  ancom <- ancombc2(data=p.dat,
                    fix_formula="Timepoint",
                    rand_formula="(1|Subject_Num)",
                    tax_level="Phylum",
                    p_adj_method="fdr")
  saveRDS(ancom, "ancom/ancom_phylum.rds")
}

# get results
res <- ancom$res

# make table
res[order(res$`q_Timepoint2`),] %>% 
    dplyr::select(taxon,
           lfc_Timepoint2,
           p_Timepoint2,
           q_Timepoint2) %>%
    DT::datatable()

res_top <- filter(res, lfc_Timepoint2 > .5 | lfc_Timepoint2 < -.5,
                  q_Timepoint2 < .05)

# Figure out who is in Verrucomicrobiota and Actinobacteriota
res_feat <- ancom$feature_table
taxonomy <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data
taxonomy_split <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data %>% parse_taxonomy()
taxonomy_split$Feature.ID <- taxonomy$Feature.ID
rarefied_table <-read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data

SVs <- read_qza("data/cr-table.qza")$data
asvs <- rownames(rarefied_table)
taxa <- vector(length=length(asvs))
phylum <- vector(length=length(asvs))
count_v <- 0
count_a <- 0

i <- 1
for (a in asvs){
    taxa[i] <- taxonomy[taxonomy$Feature.ID==a,"Taxon"]
    phylum[i] <- taxonomy_split[taxonomy_split$Feature.ID==a,"Phylum"]
    if ("Verrucomicrobiota" %in% phylum[i] == TRUE){
      count_v <- count_v + 1
    }
    if ("Actinobacteriota" %in% phylum[i] == TRUE){
      count_a <- count_a + 1
    }
    i <- i + 1
}

total_p <- count_v + count_a

# 63 ASVs have either phyla
df <- data.frame(asvs, taxa, phylum)

tax_ver <- filter(df, phylum == "Verrucomicrobiota")

tax_act <- filter(df, phylum == "Actinobacteriota")

tax_phyla <- rbind(tax_ver, tax_act)

#write.csv(x = tax_phyla, file = "data/top_ANCOMphylum_ASVs.csv", row.names = F)
```


##### Violins: Phylum ANCOM
Run code above first.
Doing this since there is no way in ggplot to do custom y-axes for each facet, especially after log10 transformation.
Inverse hyperbolic sine trans: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/14504869/histogram-with-negative-logarithmic-scale-in-r
```{r}
# convert rarefied table to percent abundance
rarefied_table <-read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data

ra_avg_mat <- rarefied_table

for (row in 1:nrow(rarefied_table)){
  for (col in 1:ncol(rarefied_table)){
    total <- sum(rarefied_table[,col])
    ra_avg_mat[row, col] <- rarefied_table[row, col]/total * 100
  }
}

rare_df <- as.data.frame(ra_avg_mat)
top_asvs <- rare_df[(row.names(rare_df) %in% tax_phyla$asvs),]

rownames(tax_phyla) <- tax_phyla$asvs
top_asvs$Phylum <- tax_phyla[match(row.names(top_asvs),
                                   row.names(tax_phyla)),"phylum"]

top_long <- pivot_longer(top_asvs,
                         cols = c(1:26),
                         names_to = "ID",
                         values_to = "RA")
top_long$ID <- as.factor(top_long$ID)
top_long$Phylum <- as.factor(top_long$Phylum)

top_long$Timepoint <- rep(c(1,2), nrow(top_long)/2)
top_long$Timepoint <- as.factor(top_long$Timepoint)
top_long$Timepoint <- fct_recode(top_long$Timepoint,
                                 "Before" = "1",
                                 "After" = "2")

top_long$Subject <- substr(top_long$ID, start = 1, stop = 2)
top_long$Subject <- as.factor(top_long$Subject)

# amount of data is asymmetrical so splitting into separate dfs
top_ver <- filter(top_long, Phylum == "Verrucomicrobiota")
top_act <- filter(top_long, Phylum == "Actinobacteriota")

# each plot assigned to value
# PLOT A
ver <- ggplot(top_ver, aes(x=Timepoint, y= RA, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.5) +
  # connecting subjects doesn't work
  #geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  # q = 0.006994, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = 7.5, xend = "After", yend = 7.5)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=7.7, label = "**", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 15),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Verrucomicrobiota") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 8))

# PLOT B
act <- ggplot(top_act, aes(x=Timepoint, y= RA, fill = Timepoint)) +
  geom_violin(adjust=5) +
  geom_point(alpha=.5) +
  # connecting subjects doesn't work
  #geom_line(aes(group=Subject), color = 'gray', alpha = .5) +
  # q = 0.014, from res_top
  geom_segment(aes(x = "Before", y = 23, xend = "After", yend = 23)) +
  annotate(geom="text", x=1.5, y=23.5, label = "*", size = 8) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans=pseudolog10_trans) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 15),
        text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Actinobacteriota") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("mediumpurple1", "palegreen")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 25))

# grid of each plot
fig <- ggarrange(ver, act, 
                 labels = c("A", "B"),
                 nrow = 1, ncol = 2)

annotate_figure(fig,
                left = text_grob("Log(Percent Relative Abundance)", 
                                 rot = 90, size = 16),
                bottom = text_grob("Timepoint", size = 16))

#ggsave(file="figures/ANCOM_violins_phyla.png", width=12, height=6)
```


##### Volcano Plot (Phylum)
Run ANCOM BC on Phylum level first
```{r}
EnhancedVolcano(res,
                lab = res$taxon,
                x = 'lfc_Timepoint2',
                y = 'q_Timepoint2',
                ylim = c(0, 7.5),
                pCutoff = .05,
                FCcutoff = .5,
                parseLabels = TRUE,
                drawConnectors = TRUE,
                arrowheads = FALSE,
                widthConnectors = .5,
                colConnectors = 'black',
                typeConnectors = "closed")

#ggsave("figures/volcano_phylum.png", height=7, width=9, units="in")

```

### ANCOM and SCNIC
Help on reading asymmetrical table: https://stat.ethz.ch/pipermail/r-help/2005-November/082681.html
```{r}
taxonomy <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data
tax.map <- taxonomy$Taxon
names(tax.map) <- taxonomy$Feature.ID

metadata <- read_q2metadata("data/aya_meta_costarica.tsv")
metadata <- filter(metadata, Consumed_Aya == "yes")
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$SampleID

all_mods <- read_q2biom("modules_output/collapsed.biom")
mods <- all_mods[351:516,] # only keep modules

p.mods <- phyloseq(otu_table(mods, taxa_are_rows=T),
                  sample_data(metadata))

# Run ANCOM BC
if (file.exists("ancom/ancom_mods.rds")) {
  ancom.mods <- readRDS("ancom/ancom_mods.rds")
} else {
  ancom.mods <- ancombc2(data=p.mods, 
                              fix_formula="Timepoint", 
                              rand_formula="(1|Subject_Num)",
                              p_adj_method="fdr")
  saveRDS(ancom.mods, "ancom/ancom_mods.rds")
}


# get results
res2 <- ancom.mods$res

# Code by Sundar Dorai-Raj: reading asymmetrical tables
## read in the file to determine the max number of columns
x <- scan("modules_output/modules.txt", what = "", sep = "\n")
x <- strsplit(x, "[ \t]+") # split string by white space
max.col <- max(sapply(x, length))

## option 1
## specify col.names as ?read.table suggests
cn <- paste("V", 1:max.col, sep = "")
mod_table <- read.table("modules_output/modules.txt", 
                        fill = TRUE, 
                        col.names = cn)


# barcodes to full name
for (row in 1:nrow(mod_table)){
  for (col in 1:ncol(mod_table)){
    barcode <- mod_table[row, col]
    ifelse(is.na(tax.map[barcode]) == FALSE,
           mod_table[row, col] <- tax.map[barcode],
           mod_table[row, col] <- mod_table[row, col])
  }
}

rownames(mod_table) <- mod_table$V1
mod_table <- dplyr::select(mod_table, -V1)
  
# make list of names
name_list <- list()
for (row in 1:nrow(mod_table)){
  rname <- rownames(mod_table)[row]
  col.list <- mod_table[row,]
  emptycols <- colSums(col.list == "") == nrow(col.list)
  col.list<- col.list[!emptycols]
  col.list <- unlist(col.list, use.names = F)
  cl2 <- paste(col.list, collapse = "; ")
  name_list[row] <- cl2
}

name_df <- mod_table
name_df$names <- name_list
name_df <- dplyr::select(name_df, names)

# add names to results df
rownames(res2) <- res2$taxon

nl2 <- list()
for (row in 1:nrow(res2)){
  rname <- rownames(res2[row,])
  nl2[row] <- unlist(name_df[rname,])
}

res2$names <- nl2


# make table
res2[order(res2$`q_Timepoint2`),] %>% 
     dplyr::select(names,
            lfc_Timepoint2,
            p_Timepoint2,
            q_Timepoint2,
            ) %>%
     DT::datatable()

res2_top <- filter(res2, 
                   lfc_Timepoint2 > 1 | lfc_Timepoint2 < -1,
                   q_Timepoint2 < .05)

res2_top$taxon <- as.factor(res2_top$taxon)
res2_top$taxon <- fct_relevel(res2_top$taxon,
                              c("module_68",
                                "module_86",
                                "module_12"))
res2_top$taxon <- fct_recode(res2_top$taxon,
                             "68" = "module_68",
                             "86" = "module_86",
                             "12" = "module_12")
# mod12 <- name_list[[12]]
# mod68 <- name_list[[68]]
# mod86 <- name_list[[86]]
# top_names <- data.frame(mod12, mod68, mod86)

# index + 1 to get top mods
top_names <- mod_table[c(13,69,87),]
top_names$mod <- c("12", "68", "86")

#write_csv(top_names, file = "modules_output/top_modules.csv")

```


#### SCNIC Bar plot
```{r}
ggplot(res2_top, aes(y=taxon, x=lfc_Timepoint2, fill=taxon)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", color="black", width = .9) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=lfc_Timepoint2-se_Timepoint2,
                    xmax=lfc_Timepoint2+se_Timepoint2),
                width=.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c('lightgreen', 'mediumpurple', 'mediumpurple')) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0) +
  ylab("Module") +
  xlab("Log2(Before/After)") +
  # q = 0.00029 for mod_68 (FDR-adjusted p-value)
  annotate("text", y="68", x=2.15, label="***", size = 8) +
  # q = 0.047 for mod_86
  annotate("text", y="86", x=-1.45, label="*", size = 8) +
  # q = 0.006 for module 12
  annotate("text", y="12", x=-1.5, label="**", size = 8) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=.5, size=18),
        axis.title.x = element_text(vjust=.2, size=16),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=14),
        legend.position = "none")


```


#### Faceted boxplots and spaghetti plots
Run the code above first.

```{r}
relative_mods <- t(t(mods)/colSums(mods))
rm_df <- as.data.frame(relative_mods)
rm_df$module <- rownames(rm_df)
rm_df <- filter(rm_df,
                module == "module_12" | module == "module_68" | module == "module_86")

rm_df <- dplyr::select(rm_df, -module)
rm_df <- as.data.frame(t(rm_df))
rm_df$ID <- rownames(rm_df)
rm_df$Timepoint <- rep(c(1,2), 13)

rm_long <- pivot_longer(rm_df,
                        cols = c("module_12", "module_68", "module_86"),
                        names_to = "Module",
                        values_to = "Abundance")
id_list <- rm_long$ID
id_list2 <- substr(id_list, start = 1, stop = 2)
rm_long$Subject <- id_list2 
rm_long$Subject <- as.factor(rm_long$Subject)

rm_long$Module <- as.factor(rm_long$Module)
rm_long$Module <- fct_relevel(rm_long$Module,
                              c("module_68",
                                "module_86",
                                "module_12"))

rm_long$Module <- fct_recode(rm_long$Module,
                             "68" = "module_68",
                             "86" = "module_86",
                             "12" = "module_12")
rm_long$Timepoint <- as.factor(rm_long$Timepoint)

rm_long$Abundance <- rm_long$Abundance*100

ggplot(rm_long, aes(x=Timepoint, y=Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_swarm(shape=16,
             position=position_jitter(0.2),
             color="black") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log10') +
  facet_wrap(rm_long$Module, scales='free')


ggplot(rm_long, aes(x=Timepoint, y=Abundance)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(aes(group=Subject)) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log2') +
  facet_wrap(rm_long$Module, scales='free')


```


### PCoA
```{r}
pcoa_w_uni <- read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/weighted_unifrac_pcoa_results.qza")$data

# PCoA plot with weighted UniFrac
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata <- pcoa_w_uni$Vectors
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$SampleID
rownames(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata) <- pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$SampleID
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata <- merge(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata, metadata)
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- ifelse(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Timepoint=="1",
                                    yes="Before", no="After")
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- factor(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group)
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- fct_relevel(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group, "Before", "After")


ggplot(data=pcoa_w_uni_plotdata,
       mapping=aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=Group, label=Subject_Num, shape=Sex)) +
    geom_text(color="black") + 
    geom_point(alpha=0.6, size=8) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("Before" = "mediumpurple1", "After" = "palegreen")) +
    geom_line(aes(group = Subject_Num),color="grey") +
    theme_bw() + 
    stat_ellipse(aes(group = Group), level =.95) +
    #scale_color_discrete(name="") +
    xlab(paste0("PC1 (", round(pcoa_w_uni$ProportionExplained[1]*100, 1), "%)")) +
    ylab(paste0("PC2 (", round(pcoa_w_uni$ProportionExplained[2]*100, 1), "%)")) +
    theme(text = element_text(size=16),
          legend.text=element_text(size=16),
          legend.position = c(0.1, 0.85),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_blank(),
          panel.background = element_blank())

ggsave(file="figures/pcoa.png", width=10, height=8)
ggsave(file="figures/pcoa.svg", width=10, height=8)

```



#### PCoA w ASV biplot
Run ANCOM ASV level first
```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
pcoa_w_uni <- read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/weighted_unifrac_pcoa_results.qza")$data

# PCoA plot with weighted UniFrac
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata <- pcoa_w_uni$Vectors
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$SampleID
rownames(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata) <- pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$SampleID
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata <- merge(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata, metadata)
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- ifelse(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Timepoint=="1",
                                    yes="Before", no="After")
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- factor(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group)
pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group <- fct_relevel(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$Group, "Before", "After")

rarefied_table <-read_qza("core-diversity-results-cr/rarefied_table.qza")$data
taxonomy <- read_qza("data/taxonomy-silva.qza")$data
asvs <- rownames(rarefied_table)
taxa <- vector(length=length(asvs))

i <- 1
for (a in asvs){
    taxa[i] <- taxonomy[taxonomy$Feature.ID==a,"Taxon"]
    i <- i + 1
}

taxa_clean <- give_nickname(taxa, one_name = T)
rarefied_table_tax <- rarefied_table
rownames(rarefied_table_tax) <- taxa_clean

# making biplot arrows
r_otus <- rarefied_table_tax
r_otus <- t(r_otus)
r_otus <- sweep(r_otus, 1, rowSums(r_otus), '/')


w_unipcoa <- dplyr::select(pcoa_w_uni_plotdata, PC1, PC2)
w_unipcoa <- data.matrix(w_unipcoa)
rownames(w_unipcoa) <- pcoa_w_uni_plotdata$SampleID

# get indices for ANCOM results
top_asvs <- res_asv_top$taxon
df_rotus <- as.data.frame(rarefied_table)
```
